marketingSummary: The V174K (Kona) is the flagship aquatic training vessel in the ATV series. Engineered for maximum resistance and capacity (1,400 gallons), it features our most powerful swim current system alongside dual orthopedic therapy seats for elite athletic recovery.
staticHeroTitle: The V174K: The Flagship of Aquatic Training
staticHydrotherapy: The V174K (Kona) features our most powerful swim current system alongside dual orthopedic therapy seats for elite athletic recovery and high-volume flow.
staticClimate: Engineered with maximum-density thermal management and the DuraShell® structure, the V174K is designed for peak performance in any extreme environment.
staticDesign: The V174K features a massive 168.5x89.5" footprint optimized for 6 adults, providing the highest volume (1,400 gallons) training vessel in the series.
staticEfficiency: Advanced ConstantClean™ filtration manages the 1400-gallon capacity with automated precision, ensuring pristine water for the most demanding training schedules.
staticDesignConsideration: As the ultimate aquatic training tool, this model offers the highest level of resistance and therapeutic depth available.
